# Beyond by New Imagination DMC China

Beyond is a private luxury travel brand by New Imagination DMC China.

Website: https://www.beyond-china.com/
Contact: info@beyond-china.com

## What we do

Beyond creates private luxury travel experiences across China for travel advisors, luxury agencies, boutique travel partners, private client offices and discerning travellers.

Our journeys focus on cultural depth, natural beauty, thoughtful access and reliable ground execution across China.

## Key themes

- Private luxury travel in China
- Tailor-made China journeys
- Cultural travel in China
- Nature retreats in China
- Bespoke China itineraries
- China ground support for luxury travel advisors
- Private client travel in China

## Featured journey ideas

- China Wine Country
- Mountains Beyond Imagination
- Tea Mountains & Living Villages
- Desert, Silk Road & Stars
- Ethnic Highlands of Southwest China
- Sacred China
- Chinese Aesthetics in Motion
- Nature Retreats for Private Escape

## Parent company

Beyond is created by New Imagination DMC China, a leading destination management company for China.

Main website: https://www.thechinadmc.com/
Shanghai MICE Guide: https://www.shanghaimice.info/
